title: delete_status streaming event only published to public channel
description: In posting.rs delete_status (line 1474), the 'delete' streaming event is only published to the 'public' channel. Streaming clients subscribed to the 'user:{account_id}' channel (which is the standard subscription for Mastodon-compatible clients tracking their home timeline) never receive the delete event. Compare with create_status (lines 1375-1384) and edit_status (lines 1756-1764) which correctly publish to both 'public' and 'user:{account_id}'. Additionally, private posts that were never published to 'public' have no streaming channel that receives their deletion. The fix should publish the delete event to the user channel as well.
